items.title: Work the remaining rule-unit review decisions
items.reason: 532 queue items still need approve, revise, split, or quarantine decisions.
items.next_action: Use /app/review filters to work pending items and rebuild the apply proposal.

items.title: Apply reviewed canonical changes only after decisions exist
items.reason: The guarded apply path is ready, but no canonical changes should be applied without real decisions.
items.next_action: Apply only batches with valid replacement records and the confirmation phrase.

items.title: Add formal legal review before reliance
items.reason: Reviewed rule units improve data quality but do not replace legal review.
items.next_action: Define who can approve production-ready legal guidance.
